login.title: Culture Survey
login.subtitle: Admin Portal
login.heading: Sign in
login.description: Enter your credentials to access the admin panel
login.networkError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Welcome to Culture Survey
dashboard.subtitle: Your employee engagement survey platform
dashboard.gettingStartedDescription: Complete these steps to run your first survey
dashboard.step3: Import employee email list and send invitations
dashboard.noResponsesBody: Send survey invitations and responses will appear here.
dashboard.sectionEESTrendDesc: Employee Engagement Score and GPTW satisfaction across all survey years
dashboard.sectionPillarPerformanceDesc: % favorable vs industry benchmark — hover for zone analysis
dashboard.sectionOverallSentimentDesc: How employees feel — positive answers (4-5) vs neutral (3) vs negative (1-2)
dashboard.sectionIndustryBenchmarkDesc: Our scores vs GPTW Best Workplaces 2024–2025 averages — gap annotations on our score bars
dashboard.sectionRelationshipAxesDesc: 3 key relationship dimensions that explain where issues originate
dashboard.sectionPillarHeatmapDesc: 5 pillars × departments — cells are color-coded relative to the overall average
dashboard.sectionSubPillarDeepDiveDesc: 15 sub-pillars grouped by dimension — click any section to expand or collapse
dashboard.sectionRelationshipStatementsDesc: Per-statement scores grouped by the 3 relationship axes — select a tab to explore each axis
dashboard.sectionLeadershipPerspectiveDesc: Pillar scores: People Managers vs Individual Contributors
dashboard.sectionConfidenceInLeadershipDesc: 5 Credibility statements measuring trust in leadership
dashboard.sectionEnpsDetailDesc: Computed from the 2 endorsement statements (PRI-31 + PRI-35)
dashboard.sectionInternalBenchmarkDesc: Dimension scores compared across all survey years — track improvement over time
dashboard.sectionTenureJourneyDesc: Pillar scores across employee service year bands — tracks engagement through career lifecycle
dashboard.sectionTenureInsightsDesc: Two sub-dimensions most at risk for long-tenured employees
dashboard.sectionEarlyWarningDesc: Departments where "Their Job" AND Credibility are below average
dashboard.sectionQualitativeDesc: Keyword-based sentiment classification of open-ended responses. No raw text is displayed to protect anonymity.
dashboard.noEarlyWarningsDesc: All departments are performing at or above the overall average on both Their Job and Credibility dimensions.
dashboard.dualAxisRiskDesc: Both "Their Job" relationship and Credibility pillar score below the overall average. These departments may be experiencing leadership and role clarity issues simultaneously.
dashboard.sentimentQ1: Q1 — What makes this a great place to work?
dashboard.sentimentQ2: Q2 — What would you change to improve the workplace?
dashboard.sentimentMethodology: Sentiment is classified using keyword matching. "Frustrated" responses contain language about negative experiences. "Constructive" responses contain suggestions or improvement requests. "Positive" responses express satisfaction or appreciation.
dashboard.noHistoricalData: No historical survey data available for trend analysis.
dashboard.insufficientLeadership: Insufficient data for leadership confidence analysis.
dashboard.insufficientLeadershipComparison: Insufficient responses to display leadership comparison
dashboard.internalBenchmarkMin: At least 2 surveys are required for internal benchmark comparison.
dashboard.gapAnnotation: Gap annotations shown on our score bars
dashboard.tenureInsightsInfo: Caring (work-life balance, recognition, psychological safety) and Support (training, development) by tenure
dashboard.zoneStrongDesc: Healthy foundation. Small improvements yield big returns.
dashboard.zoneModerateDesc: Room to grow. Focus on specific sub-dimensions.
dashboard.zoneConcernDesc: Below expectations. Develop an action plan.
dashboard.zoneCriticalDesc: Urgent intervention needed. Immediate leadership attention.

surveys.title: Surveys
surveys.emptyBody: Create a survey to start collecting employee feedback.
surveys.uploadHint: Upload an Excel file to preview questions before saving.
surveys.uploadDropzone: Drag and drop your .xlsx file here, or click to browse
surveys.uploadFormatError: File must be an .xlsx or .xls file.
surveys.uploadParseError: Could not read questions from this file. Check that columns match the expected format.
surveys.deleteConfirmBody: All associated questions and invitation links will be removed permanently.
surveys.deleteConfirm: Delete this survey and all its questions, tokens, and responses? This cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.smtpDescription: Configure your outbound email server to send survey invitations.
settings.testFailure: Could not connect to SMTP server. Check your host and port, then try again. Error: {error}
settings.testAuthFailure: Authentication failed. Check your username and password.
settings.saveError: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

email.smtpModalBody: To send survey invitations to employees, you need to configure your outbound email server first.
email.inviteEmailsPlaceholder: Paste email addresses, one per line or comma-separated
email.inviteEmailsNone: Enter at least one email address to continue.
email.csvUploadHint: CSV must have a column header named "email". One email per row.
email.csvDropzone: Drag and drop your .csv file here, or click to browse
email.csvParseError: Could not read emails from this file. Ensure there is an "email" column header.
email.csvNoEmails: No valid email addresses found in the CSV file.
email.csvPreviewDescription: {valid} valid emails found. {invalid} invalid entries skipped.

errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to view this page

survey.invalidLinkTitle: This link is no longer valid
survey.invalidLinkBody: This survey has already been submitted or the link has expired. Please contact your administrator for assistance.
survey.usedLinkBody: This survey link has already been used. Each link can only be used once.
survey.notFoundBody: This survey link does not exist or has expired.
survey.confirmBody: Your responses will be recorded anonymously. You will not be able to modify them after submission.
survey.thankYouBody: Your responses have been recorded anonymously. Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback.
survey.thankYouClose: You may now close this page.
survey.validationRequired: Please answer all required questions before submitting.
survey.optionalHelper: Optional — share as much or as little as you would like
survey.demographicAnonymityNote: Your demographic information helps us analyze results by group. Individual responses remain anonymous.
